cues.text: 這個週末一起去踢球吧！
cues.tr: Lesson 6: Let's go play soccer this weekend!

cues.text: 這個週末你有空嗎？
cues.tr: Are you free this weekend?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 有啊，你有什麼計劃嗎？
cues.tr: Yes, do you have any plans?
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 我想去踢球，你要不要一起去？
cues.tr: I'd like to play soccer, do you want to go with me?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 好主意！我很久沒踢球了，這次正好可以鍛鍊一下。
cues.tr: Good idea! I haven't played soccer for a long time, and this is a good time to practice.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 那我們定在星期六早上怎麼樣？
cues.tr: How about Saturday morning?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 星期六早上幾點？
cues.tr: What time on Saturday morning?
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 大概九點左右，這樣我們有足夠的時間鍛鍊。
cues.tr: Around nine o'clock, so we'll have enough time to practise.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 九點可以，我也喜歡早上鍛鍊，特別是天氣好的時候。
cues.tr: nine o'clock can, I also like to exercise in the morning, especially when the weather is good.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 沒錯，早上的空氣特別新鮮，踢球更有意思。
cues.tr: Yes, the air is especially fresh in the morning, and it's more fun to play soccer.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 對了，你知道哪裡有好一點的球場嗎？
cues.tr: By the way, do you know where there is a better ball field?
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 有啊，我知道一個離我們不遠的公園，裡面有一個特別大的球場。
cues.tr: Yes, I know a park not far from us, there is a particularly large ball field.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 太好了！那我們星期六早上見吧。
cues.tr: That's great! I'll see you Saturday morning.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 需要帶什麼東西嗎？
cues.tr: Do you need to bring anything?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 帶一瓶水和一些點心吧，踢完球我們可以休息一下。
cues.tr: Bring a bottle of water and some snacks, so we can take a break after playing soccer.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 好的，那我準備一些水果，你準備水怎麼樣？
cues.tr: Okay, I'll prepare some fruits and you prepare water.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 沒問題，我會帶幾瓶水過去。
cues.tr: No problem, I will bring a few bottles of water.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 說實話，我有點擔心，因為我很久沒踢球了。
cues.tr: To be honest, I'm a bit worried because I haven't played soccer for a long time.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 別擔心，萬事起頭難，我們可以慢慢來。
cues.tr: Don't worry, everything is difficult at the beginning, we can take our time.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 你說得對，重要的是鍛鍊和放鬆，不用太在意輸贏。
cues.tr: You're right, the important thing is to train and relax, not to care too much about winning or losing.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 是啊，我們可以互相教學，讓彼此進步。
cues.tr: Yes, we can teach each other to make progress.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 那就這麼說定了，星期六九點見！
cues.tr: So it's settled, see you at nine o'clock on Saturday!
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 好的，一言為定！
cues.tr: Okay, it's a deal!
cues.speaker: B
